summary: Tested OptiCRM iteration 6 features: staff management + customer CSV export/import. Backend: 22/22 pytest tests pass on the public preview URL covering login (super_admin/owner/staff), staff list RBAC (403 for staff), staff CRUD (create/update/delete with duplicate-email 400, cannot-delete-self 400, cannot-delete-owner 403, password_hash never returned, no _id leakage), CSV export (200 with header 'name,phone,email...' for owner; 403 for staff), template CSV, /customers-import (imported=2, skipped_duplicates=1, 2 error rows for missing name/phone), and tenant isolation (owner sees only own tenant's users). Frontend (mobile 390x844): owner login routes to /dashboard, More tab shows 'Staff & Users' + 'Import / Export' tiles, + button creates a staff user that appears in list immediately, edit screen opens with status/role/password fields. Staff login (staff1@test.com) correctly HIDES Staff and Data tiles via adminOnly filter. /data screen renders Export Customers, Export Sales, Download Template, Import Customers buttons.

minor.issue: Status enum accepts only 'active'|'suspended' (StaffUpdateIn). This matches the UI which already uses 'suspended'. Note for main agent: keep these in sync if any future doc says 'inactive'.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1419 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline; consider splitting into auth.py, customers.py, staff.py, csv_io.py modules for maintainability.

Console warning observed in web preview: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents.' Originates from React Native Web upgrade path; main agent may want to migrate any explicit pointerEvents props to style.pointerEvents.
seed_data_creation: Created via /customers-import test: 2 TEST_Import customers (phones starting +91900000, +91901111). Created and deleted transient TEST_staff_* and TEST_del_* users via fixtures (auto-cleanup). One UI-created user 'UI Test 756112' (test_ui_756112@example.com) remains from the Playwright test — minor and visible in /staff list.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://mobile-optical-sync.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_staff_csv.py. Staff status enum is active|suspended (NOT inactive). New customer-import endpoints are /api/customers-import and /api/customers-template.csv (hyphen, not slash) due to route collision fix.
